TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Charles B. Black sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1921 , ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 6, Charles B. Black, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1992) 196 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 91 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. qyanux nya Black htagan beh sa aytahco aq tmasoq mqwas maki Kansas City, Missouri Southwest pqwasan biru. Black ga sraral mtzyaw maki Kansas ru maki kosi ppqumah. kawas tay 1984 wal wayan mhngaw la maki beh Rogers, Arkansas. hiya ga maki 1992 kawas 12 byacing 22 ryax wal mhuqil la.(pitu' pgal kawas) pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨħarles~ɕ β. βlaʦ~ʨk s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ʦ~ʨħarles~ɕ β. βlaʦ~ʨk, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. qjanux nja βlaʦ~ʨk ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa ajtaħʦ~ʨo aq tmas~ɕoq mqwas~ɕ maki kans~ɕas~ɕ ʦ~ʨitj, mis~ɕs~ɕouri s~ɕoutħwes~ɕt pqwas~ɕan βiru. βlaʦ~ʨk ɣa s~ɕraral mtzjaw maki kans~ɕas~ɕ ru maki kos~ɕi ppqumaħ. kawas~ɕ taj **** wal wajan mħŋaw la maki βeħ roɣers~ɕ, arkans~ɕas~ɕ. ħija ɣa maki **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax wal mħuqil la.(pituʔ pɣal kawas~ɕ) pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Charles B. Black sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1921 , ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 6, Charles B. Black, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1992) 196 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 91 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. qyanux nya Black htagan beh sa aytahco aq tmasoq mqwas maki Kansas City, Missouri Southwest pqwasan biru. Black ga sraral mtzyaw maki Kansas ru maki kosi ppqumah. kawas tay 1984 wal wayan mhngaw la maki beh Rogers, Arkansas. hiya ga maki 1992 kawas 12 byacing 22 ryax wal mhuqil la.(pitu' pgal kawas) pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨħarles~ɕ β. βlaʦ~ʨk s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ʦ~ʨħarles~ɕ β. βlaʦ~ʨk, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. qjanux nja βlaʦ~ʨk ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa ajtaħʦ~ʨo aq tmas~ɕoq mqwas~ɕ maki kans~ɕas~ɕ ʦ~ʨitj, mis~ɕs~ɕouri s~ɕoutħwes~ɕt pqwas~ɕan βiru. βlaʦ~ʨk ɣa s~ɕraral mtzjaw maki kans~ɕas~ɕ ru maki kos~ɕi ppqumaħ. kawas~ɕ taj **** wal wajan mħŋaw la maki βeħ roɣers~ɕ, arkans~ɕas~ɕ. ħija ɣa maki **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax wal mħuqil la.(pituʔ pɣal kawas~ɕ) pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
